steps: Go to https://dashboard.convex.dev and sign in or create an account
Select the project and deployment you want to access
Open the deployment's Settings page (gear icon or 'Settings' in the left sidebar)
Scroll to the 'Deploy Key' or 'Admin Key' section
Click 'Generate Deploy Key' to create a new key
Copy the deploy key — it starts with your deployment name followed by a JWT token (e.g., happy-animal-123|eyJ...)
Use this key as your API key with the 'Convex' prefix: Authorization: Convex <deploy_key>

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Deploy Key
credential_fields.description: Your Convex deployment key. Used as a Bearer token with 'Convex' prefix. Found in Dashboard > Deployment Settings.

notes: Deploy keys are scoped to a specific deployment (production, development, or preview)
Free tier is available with generous limits for development
Admin keys provide complete control over a deployment — treat them as secrets
Each call must also include the target deployment URL as part of the request path
The HTTP API base URL is https://<your-deployment-name>.convex.cloud
